name: abilityai
description: High-quality Claude Code plugins from Ability.ai - productivity tools, workflow automation, and agent orchestration

plugins.name: trinity-onboard
plugins.description: Onboard agents to Trinity, sync credentials, create scheduled tasks, and fork agents to client repositories

plugins.name: playbook-builder
plugins.description: Create structured, transactional playbooks with state management for autonomous, gated, or manual execution

plugins.name: file-indexing
plugins.description: File system indexing for workspace awareness - creates and maintains a searchable file index

plugins.name: brain-memory
plugins.description: Zettelkasten-style knowledge management - atomic notes with connections and semantic search

plugins.name: json-memory
plugins.description: Structured JSON memory system with efficient jq-based updates and action logging

plugins.name: workspace-kit
plugins.description: Workspace scaffolding - organized folders, indexes, and templates for multi-session work

plugins.name: project-planner
plugins.description: Plan and execute large multi-session projects with scope analysis, session splitting, and state tracking

plugins.name: utilities
plugins.description: General-purpose utility skills for conversation management, ops workflows, and agent productivity

plugins.name: agent-builder
plugins.description: Scaffold a new Trinity-compatible Claude Code agent from scratch on any topic — creates directory, CLAUDE.md, initial skills, and Trinity files ready for development

plugins.name: clone-cornelius
plugins.description: Clone the Cornelius agent repository and launch Claude Code inside it

plugins.name: install-prospector
plugins.description: Create a B2B SaaS sales research agent — guided wizard that scaffolds a Trinity-compatible agent customized to your sales stack

plugins.name: install-chiefofstaff
plugins.description: Create an executive chief of staff agent — daily briefings, meeting prep, decision tracking, and weekly digests

plugins.name: install-webmaster
plugins.description: Create a website management agent — guided wizard that scaffolds a Trinity-compatible webmaster agent for building and deploying Next.js sites

plugins.name: install-recon
plugins.description: Create a competitive intelligence agent — guided wizard that scaffolds a Trinity-compatible agent for tracking competitors, monitoring changes, and producing actionable intelligence

plugins.name: install-receptionist
plugins.description: Create an email gateway agent — guided wizard that scaffolds a Trinity-compatible receptionist agent for public-facing email communication and request routing

plugins.name: install-ghostwriter
plugins.description: Create a content writer agent — guided wizard that scaffolds a Trinity-compatible ghostwriter agent that knows your brand voice and writes platform-specific content

plugins.name: install-kb-agent
plugins.description: Create a knowledge-base agent — guided wizard that scaffolds a Cornelius-shaped, Trinity-compatible KB agent for any domain (community manager, CS researcher, clinical research, legal analyst, personal KB, or custom)

plugins.name: website-builder
plugins.description: Scaffold a single production-ready Next.js 15 website and deploy to Vercel — no agent, just a site

plugins.name: dev-methodology
plugins.description: Documentation-driven development methodology with skills, agents, and project memory templates. Enforces a 5-phase development cycle: context loading, development, testing, documentation, and PR validation.

plugins.name: github-backlog
plugins.description: Manage agent tasks via GitHub Issues — view backlog, pick work, update status, run autonomous work loops

plugins.name: install-github-backlog
plugins.description: Add GitHub Issues backlog workflow to any agent — creates skills in the agent directory for task management
